description: Vidyard is a video selling platform with AI-generated personalized videos, hosting, and engagement tracking that helps sales teams stand out and book more meetings.
overview: Vidyard helps sales and marketing teams record and personalize videos at scale with an AI video agent, host them, and track engagement to lift replies and meetings.
what_is: Vidyard is an AI-powered video selling platform. It helps reps cut through a crowded inbox with personalized video messages, and its AI video agent can create and deliver customized videos at scale to lift reply and meeting rates.

It is strongest in prospecting, support, and closing, automating video creation and tracking viewer engagement. Teams tend to see more replies and meetings soon after adopting it, with less manual effort per video.

Vidyard integrates with tools like LinkedIn, Salesloft, and CRMs to centralize activity and enrich data with engagement insight. It is focused on personalized sales video workflows rather than full video editing or production.
